whatever you wanna call me, most call me Randy though

like the layouts, gimmicks, and visuals I’m always happy with it’s just the design and balance
more chill maker over the years

Humble Bundle is the hypothetical 7-in-1 game pack of the humble series, with QoL additions, transitions between games, and potentially extra optional content
i need to add change to the spreadsheet
yeah this will be separate and have a bunch of extra stuff
the chaos pack is just every stand alone game randy has made, regardless of if it's humble related or not

yeha the pack is just all solo work
Humble Bundle would aim to merge all 7 games into an experience you could technically play in one single sitting (don't that'd suck)
while also polishing stuff (improved visuals, updating effects to look better, making songs higher quality)
polishing stuff would also include adding a save here despite also autosaving
the biggest hurdle and like 50% of the work is getting all 7 games in 1 project
i gotta port all the games into one
once that's done it would take like, maybe a month and that's generous
but porting all of it into one thing is a big undertaking
